scripts.plan:sample: rm -rf .tmp/plans && node scripts/generate-business-authority-plans.mjs --inventory fixtures/inventory.sample.json --output .tmp/plans --mode scaffold && node scripts/generate-business-authority-plans.mjs --inventory fixtures/inventory.sample.json --output .tmp/plans --mode validate
scripts.check: pnpm validate && pnpm plan:sample && pnpm build && pnpm typecheck
